task_description: Three-part task: (1) Fix antigravity model routing bug where unrecognized model prefixes from MITM mappings incorrectly fall to commandcode. (2) Redesign the provider page to match OmniRoute's category-pill + collapsible-section layout while keeping AxonRouter's minimalist shadcn/ui style. (3) Audit the provider test system so all provider types can be tested.
